sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_blobs (id INTEGER, data BLOB, timestamp TIME);
INSERT INTO test_blobs VALUES (1, '\xAA'::BLOB, TIME '12:00:00'), (2, '\xBB'::BLOB, TIME '15:30:00'), (3, NULL, TIME '02:15:45');
SELECT id, data || data AS concatenated_blob, timestamp + INTERVAL 5 HOUR AS new_time FROM test_blobs WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, data, timestamp, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_blobs T WHERE T.data IS NOT NULL) AS blob_count FROM test_blobs WHERE data || '\xCC'::BLOB IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, data, timestamp + INTERVAL (CASE WHEN id = 1 THEN 2 ELSE 5 END) HOUR AS adjusted_time FROM test_blobs WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_intervals (event_id INTEGER, event_time TIME, duration INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO test_intervals VALUES (1, TIME '01:00:00', INTERVAL '3 HOUR'), (2, TIME '02:30:00', INTERVAL NULL);
SELECT event_id, event_time + (duration || INTERVAL '1 HOUR') AS final_time FROM test_intervals WHERE duration IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.id, a.data, a.timestamp, (a.data || b.data) AS combined_data FROM test_blobs a JOIN test_blobs b ON a.id = b.id + 1 WHERE b.data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (data || '\xDD'::BLOB) AS combined_data, (SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)) FROM test_blobs) AS average_hour FROM test_blobs GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(data) > 0;
SELECT id, data, timestamp, (data || '\xEE'::BLOB) AS extended_blob FROM test_blobs WHERE (timestamp + INTERVAL 2 HOUR) < TIME '14:00:00' AND data IS NOT NULL;
